summary: Aligned project record row-click navigation so detail routes stop inheriting the list scene query identity.
verification: bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm -C frontend/apps/web typecheck:strict'
next_suggestion: Refresh the project list, click back into the same record, and verify the detail URL no longer carries scene_key=projects.list; then continue trimming any remaining top action-strip differences.
